policy_name: NOXH Apartment B Clean Geometry Lock

wall_reference_policy.external_reference_note: NOXH_Apartment_B_clean should export external walls on the drawn apartment outer shell unless QA proves a different wall reference convention is needed.

geometry_priority_note: Seeded from the Apartment clean baseline and updated with Apartment B room areas read from the cleaned DXF labels. The single-block gate is disabled for the first production run because Apartment B did not satisfy the current connected-partition policy check.
